uplink.description: Negative temperature event on port 3 (synthetic in-bounds)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds: raw temp 0xFE00 = -512 -> -5.12 C; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input (tempNOW [-5.12], humNOW [40], batLevel 45) and mapping to the normalized vocabulary.

Newest sample (index 0) at top level; remaining 7 samples in the camelCase extra `additionalSamples` because the history frame carries no per-sample timestamps. expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input (tempNOW/humNOW arrays, batLevel 75.5) and mapping to the normalized vocabulary.

CONFIG payload carries no normalized measurement; battery percentage -> batteryPercent, all device-configuration fields are camelCase extras. expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (batLevel 74.5 + config fields).

uplink.description: Info data on port 101 (firmware version, vendor extras)
uplink._note: INFO payload carries no normalized measurement; battery percentage -> batteryPercent, firmware version as camelCase extras (renamed from upstream appMainVers/appMinorVers). expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (batLevel 72.5, appMainVers 1, appMinorVers 3).
Synthetic: upstream returns 'Invalid FPort' for any port other than 3/100/101.
Synthetic: first byte must be PAYLOAD_VERSION 0x01; upstream returns 'Invalid payload version' otherwise.
